_comment_navigationFallback: Standard SPA fallback — when a user reloads any unknown path, serve index.html so client-side routing handles it. Excludes asset paths so static files keep 404'ing cleanly when missing. /trace?id=<uuid> doesn't need a custom rewrite because /trace/index.html is a real file (Astro builds it from src/pages/trace/index.astro); only the ?id= query param is dynamic.
